acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A streamed agent message cannot create one permanent AuditEvent per token or text delta
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Outbox.auditable_update?/1 rejects item/agentMessage/delta and token-count updates; regression coverage asserts the classification.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: One long turn produces bounded telemetry events
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Only semantic lifecycle updates enter the durable outbox; retained App Server summaries are explicitly bounded.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Final agent messages and command/tool lifecycle events remain reconstructible
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Final messages, failures, command metadata and tool lifecycle classes remain auditable and covered.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Restart flushes aggregates without duplication or loss
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Confirmed legacy telemetry is compacted, unconfirmed events are preserved/restored, and damaged legacy chains are deterministically rebased from the confirmed ledger head.
The integrated canonical JSON and outbox hash-chain tests pass with 100 percent project coverage.
Clean integrated main: 320 tests, 0 failures, 2 intentional skips, 100 percent coverage, format/spec checks, Credo and Dialyzer clean.

artifacts.role: batched durable checkpoints and provider backpressure

summary: Issue #14 is satisfied by the integrated, later-hardened main implementation. Its obsolete divergent branch is intentionally not merged.
